Challenge is not much different than a 42 day or a six week or anything like that. In fact, it's almost exactly the same. And you know, the halfway point for the abandoned hope is relatively the same. You're just subbing out the words 28 day. Halfway or your abandoned hope will still happen at week three, so that makes it very, very simple. But that is when you're gonna pitch. And there's just a little more to keep in your head that is still almost exactly the same as a six week challenge, just over a 28 day process. And the nice thing about the 28 day is you convert to EFT a little bit quicker. And often you can blow and let's get you all set.
